name: Fazal Hameed
title: Embedded System Developer
bio:
Embedded Systems & Firmware Engineer
Specializing in designing and developing efficient, reliable embedded solutions by seamlessly integrating hardware and software.
Strong proficiency in C/C++, with hands-on experience working with microcontroller platforms including ESP32 and STM32.
Focused on building real-world applications in IoT systems, wireless communication, and smart embedded devices.
